features.name: 环境配置验证
features.description: 项目骨架搭建：package.json、tsconfig、ESLint、Prettier、CLI 入口、工具函数
features.evidence: npm install/tsc/test/build 全部通过，已推送到 GitHub

features.name: 仓库管理与文件发现
features.description: 克隆/打开仓库，遍历目录，过滤语言，尊重 .gitignore
features.evidence: 6 tests pass, file discovery with gitignore/language filtering working

features.name: 解析管道
features.description: TS/JS 文件解析，提取符号、导入、导出、调用表达式
features.evidence: 8 tests pass, ts-morph parser with re-export support

features.name: 代码图构建
features.description: 内存代码图数据结构，符号解析，索引存储

features.name: Claude 集成与问答
features.description: Claude API 封装，上下文组装，问答命令（带 file:line 引用）

features.name: GitHub 集成
features.description: PR diff 解析，影响分析，Issue 关联代码
features.evidence: 2 integration tests pass, PrAnalyzer with risk assessment

features.name: 分析能力
features.description: 调用链追踪、影响分析、Bug 定位
features.evidence: 9 tests pass (call-chain-tracer 5 + impact-analyzer 4), BFS/DFS with cycle detection

features.name: 文档生成
features.description: 自动生成 README、架构图（Mermaid）、API 文档
features.evidence: 3 integration tests pass, Mermaid architecture diagram generation

features.name: CLI 完善与集成测试
features.description: CLI 美化、端到端集成测试、文档完善
features.evidence: 54 tests pass, all 6 CLI commands wired, ARCHITECTURE.md complete

features.name: 代码质量优化
features.description: 多Agent并行优化：死代码清理、重复代码消除、测试强化
features.evidence: 160 tests pass (32 files), dead code removed, CLI boilerplate extracted, DFS unified, type duplicates eliminated

features.name: 工作流自动化
features.description: CI/CD、Git hooks、ESLint flat config、环境标准化、SessionStart hook
features.evidence: GitHub Actions CI, husky+lint-staged+commitlint, eslint.config.js, .nvmrc+.env.example, SessionStart review hook
